## Validation

- [ ] `frontend`: `npm test -- --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless`
- [ ] `backend`: `./mvnw test`
- [ ] Manual smoke check completed when applicable

## Critical Review

- [ ] No secrets or local files included (`.env`, `ferchuz/`, `.m2/`, caches, builds)
- [ ] Backend remains the source of truth for critical logic
- [ ] `DOCUMENTATION.md` updated when architecture, behavior, or workflow changed
- [ ] `docs/handoff-control-center.md` updated when private dashboard behavior changed
